CustomField.description: Defines the naming pattern for automatically generated Recurring Donation names. Supports merge field tokens like {!DonorName}, {!Amount}, {!RecurringType}. Only takes effect when Automatic Recurring Donation Naming is enabled. If blank, the system uses a default format of "{DonorName} {Amount} - Recurring."
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Name format pattern for auto-generated Recurring Donation names. Only applies when Automatic Recurring Donation Naming is enabled.
CustomField.label: Recurring Donation Name Format
